narrative:
Cols 58-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,007 registered voters, with 63.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.7%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.2 percentage points.
